title: Run Phase 4 fading channel simulations: Figs 8-10
description:
Run the fading channel simulations from Figures 8, 9, and 10.

## Figure 8: (1024, 441) product code with Rician fading

- Component: dRM(32,21) — `[(32,21)² dRM]`
- Fading: Rician K=5, N_c=128, t=4, QPSK
- Eb/N0 range: 0–8 dB

## Figure 9: (1024, 676) product code with Rician fading

- Component: eBCH(32,26) — `[(32,26)² eBCH]`
- Fading: Rician K=8, N_c=256, t=2, QPSK
- Eb/N0 range: 0–8 dB
- Note: requires eBCH(32,26) component code

## Figure 10: (4096, 3249) product code with Rician fading

- Component: eBCH(64,57) — `[(64,57)² eBCH]`
- Fading: Rician K=6, N_c=256, t=8, QPSK
- Eb/N0 range: 0–8 dB

All figures compare product code turbo-SOGRAND vs 5G NR LDPC under fading.

## Acceptance Criteria

- All three simulations run to completion.
- Results compared against paper's reference data.
- Fading channel behavior is qualitatively correct (performance degrades vs AWGN, diversity gain visible).
- Results saved in CSV/JSON format.

## Location

Extend simulation runners.
